subcodes.first_line: O scion of that glorious personage! Thy letter was sent from 'Akká to the clime of the Moon of Canaan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل آن شخص جلیل نامه شما را از عکا باقلیم ماه کنعانی فرستادند
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @conduct in finance and business, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @law of pilgrimage
